case_title: JOHN L. PLUMBING, INC. VS LCD, INC.

docket_entries.description: WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LCD, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN L. PLUMBING, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LCD, INC. $3,712.30 PRINCIPAL, $243.78 INTEREST, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,006.08, NOTHING IN THIS JUDGMENT SHALL ACT TO PRECLUDE DEFENDANT FROM SEEKING INDEMNITY FROM ANY APPROPRIATE THIRD PARTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2007 ORDERED DESTROYED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LCD, INC.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 28400, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHN L. PLUMBING, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LCD, INC. JUDGMENT ORDERED IN FAVOR OF APP/DEFT AND AGAINST RESP/PLTF IN SCA 28400 ON AUGUST 15, 2007. EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LCD, INC.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT LCD, INC.
ORDER TO RECALL WRIT SIGNED. FORWARDED TO THE SHERIFF DEPT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY JOHN L. PLUMBING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LCD, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
